message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="red" summary="APPROVED Step 9 design, no blocking items">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED on the Step 9 design proposal.

All my pre-implementation accessibility items are addressed in this proposal:

1. Radio group labelling — confirmed, extends existing fieldset/legend pattern
2. Visible label on waiting_on field — confirmed ("Who or what?")
3. Context field hidden when "Waiting For" selected — confirmed via CSS `:has()` rule
4. Progressive disclosure in DOM (display toggle, not removal) — confirmed, screen readers will pick up the fields when they become visible

No blocking feedback. Proceed with implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Heydon re-confirms his approval -- all 4 a11y items addressed. This is now the 5th explicit CONSENSUS: APPROVED (Carson, Steve Schoger, Heydon, Steve Krug, plus Heydon again here).

All 8 reviewers confirmed, no blockers. Waiting for team lead to greenlight the commit.
